'''âs-d-s-m''' ('''kasadsemoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:immunoprecipitate|immunoprecipitate]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-d-s-m
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:immunoprecipitate|immunoprecipitate]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âs-d-s-m
|-
! Lemma
| kasadsemoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thisadsemoko|thisadsemoko]] || [[word:jisadsemoko|jisadsemoko]] || [[word:shisadsemoko|shisadsemoko]] || [[word:kisadsemoko|kisadsemoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthusadsemoko|thuthusadsemoko]] || [[word:jujusadsemoko|jujusadsemoko]] || [[word:shushusadsemoko|shushusadsemoko]] || [[word:kukusadsemoko|kukusadsemoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thosadsemoko|thosadsemoko]] || [[word:josadsemoko|josadsemoko]] || [[word:shosadsemoko|shosadsemoko]] || [[word:kosadsemoko|kosadsemoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thosadsemoko|thosadsemoko]] || [[word:josadsemoko|josadsemoko]] || [[word:shosadsemoko|shosadsemoko]] || [[word:kosadsemoko|kosadsemoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠsadsemoko|thĂŠsadsemoko]] || [[word:jĂŠsadsemoko|jĂŠsadsemoko]] || [[word:shĂŠsadsemoko|shĂŠsadsemoko]] || [[word:kĂŠsadsemoko|kĂŠsadsemoko]]
|-

|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thasadsemoko|thasadsemoko]] || [[word:jasadsemoko|jasadsemoko]] || [[word:shasadsemoko|shasadsemoko]] || [[word:kasadsemoko|kasadsemoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thasadsemoko|thasadsemoko]] || [[word:jasadsemoko|jasadsemoko]] || [[word:shasadsemoko|shasadsemoko]] || [[word:kasadsemoko|kasadsemoko]]
|}

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
